name: Spicy Lentil-Potato Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a pot.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Cover and reduce heat.
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender, about 45 minutes.
NOTE: For extra spice, add a little Tabasco sauce. If using canned tomatoes, puree them in a blender or food processor before adding to the stew. You may want to add a pinch of salt if you use canned tomatoes.
